# CLAP headers

This directory vendors the official CLAP C headers used by the native moondsp
CLAP prototype.

- Upstream: <https://github.com/free-audio/clap>
- Version: 1.2.8
- Source archive: <https://github.com/free-audio/clap/archive/refs/tags/1.2.8.tar.gz>
- Source archive SHA-256: `8918abe1ce84826190b6b34b1c5b7c095221f7b8f92d5c8967f65f27cdb26ade`
- License: MIT, copied in `LICENSE`

The prototype includes these headers directly instead of maintaining a local ABI
subset.
